name: MISP
description: Integrate with MISP (Malware Information Sharing Platform) to search events, attributes, and indicators of compromise across your threat intelligence sharing community

actions.name: Search Events
actions.description: Search MISP events using flexible filters including value, type, tags, and date ranges

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Search value (IP, domain, hash, email, URL, etc.)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Attribute type filter (e.g. ip-src, ip-dst, domain, md5, sha256, url)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tag(s) to filter events by (comma-separated for OR, pipe for AND)

parameters.name: publish_timestamp
parameters.description: Filter by publish timestamp (e.g. 14d for last 14 days, or epoch range)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: returnFormat
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, csv, stix, stix2 (default: json)

actions.name: Search Attributes
actions.description: Search MISP attributes (individual IOCs) with fine-grained filters

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Attribute value to search for (IP, domain, hash, etc.)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Attribute type (ip-src, ip-dst, domain, hostname, md5, sha1, sha256, url, email-src)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Attribute category (Network activity, Payload delivery, External analysis, etc.)

parameters.name: to_ids
parameters.description: Filter to only IDS-exportable attributes

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results

parameters.name: returnFormat
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, csv, stix, stix2 (default: json)

actions.name: Get Event
actions.description: Retrieve a specific MISP event by ID with all associated attributes and objects

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: MISP event ID to retrieve

actions.name: Add Attribute
actions.description: Add a new attribute (IOC) to an existing MISP event

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: MISP event ID to add the attribute to

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Attribute type (ip-src, ip-dst, domain, md5, sha256, url, etc.)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Attribute value

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Attribute category

parameters.name: to_ids
parameters.description: Whether the attribute should be used for IDS export (default: true)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment for the attribute

actions.name: Create Event
actions.description: Create a new MISP event for sharing threat intelligence

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Event description / title

parameters.name: distribution
parameters.description: Distribution level: 0=Organization, 1=Community, 2=Connected, 3=All, 4=Sharing group

parameters.name: threat_level_id
parameters.description: Threat level: 1=High, 2=Medium, 3=Low, 4=Undefined

parameters.name: analysis
parameters.description: Analysis level: 0=Initial, 1=Ongoing, 2=Completed

actions.name: Add Tag
actions.description: Add a tag to a MISP event or attribute for categorization and filtering

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the event or attribute to tag

parameters.name: tag_name
parameters.description: Tag name to attach (e.g. tlp:white, malware:ransomware)

actions.name: Get Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve MISP instance statistics including attribute and event counts

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Statistics context: type or category

parameters.name: percentage
parameters.description: Return percentages (1) or counts (0)
